MELSubItem.Title: Forward Cargo Air Conditioning (FCAC) Compressor Systems (787-9: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A869, VN-A870, VN-A871) (*)

Para.rev:revHighlight: Added new proviso to ensure CRUMC 2 opearating normally in order for the compressor system to work.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided Cargo Refrigeration Unit Motor Controller (CRUMC) 2 operates normally.

Note.Para: Cargo Refrigeration Unit Motor Controllers (CRUMCs) are interchangeable

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Added additional info providing a description on how the Cargo Refrigeration Unite Motor Control (CRUMC) functions within the FCAC compressor system

ListItem.Para: Forward cargo temperatures may be warmer than desired. CRUMC 2 controls the compressor suction pressure and temperature sensors that are used to modulate the CRU Electronic Expansion Valve (EEV) and control the superheat of the refrigerant.
Extended operation of the CRU with either a single compressor faulted or a motor controller faulted can expose the remaining compressor to conditions that may result in further failure of the CRU
